scenes.name: rubber-stamp detection
scenes.trigger_signal: PR approved within seconds of opening, or all files marked LGTM without comment
scenes.context: Reviewer may be rubber-stamping without actually reading the code

scenes.name: style-only review trap
scenes.trigger_signal: All review comments are about formatting, naming, or import order — none about behavior
scenes.context: Reviewer is avoiding the actual logic and focusing on low-risk surface issues
applies_when: no comments reference behavior or correctness
